name: marsaifestival
description: Projet Mars AI Festival - React + Express TypeScript

scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.prestart:
echo "
🚀 Démarrage de MarsAiFestival...
   Backend  → http://localhost:5500
   Frontend → http://localhost:5173
"
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.lint: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c magenta,red "npm run lint --prefix frontend" "npm run lint --prefix backend"
scripts.test: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c cyan,blue "npm test --prefix frontend -- --run" "npm test --prefix backend"
scripts.check: concurrently -n format,lint,tests -c yellow,magenta,cyan "npm run format" "npm run lint" "npm run test"
